conflicts.description: Registry path 'skills/' does not match actual 'skills/skills/'
Hooks perform filesystem writes, violating read-only boundary

recommended_fixes.description: Fix skill registry path to match actual directory structure
Move filesystem writes from hooks to tools or dedicated write-side module
Derive phaseClassification from purposeClass or session state
Implement real diagnostics in hm-doctor tool

key_findings: Skill registry path mismatch is the root cause of 21 'missing' skills
CQRS violations in hooks block test suite from running
All 3 hivefiver tools are placeholders with no real logic
Tier 1 skill injection is dead code due to undefined phaseClassification
Config groups are properly wired to schema types and work correctly
blocked_routes: Cannot verify tool runtime behavior due to @opencode-ai/plugin/tool import issue
Cannot run full test suite due to lint:boundary failures
carry_forward.recommended_next_action: Fix skill registry path mismatch and CQRS violations before proceeding with further integration testing
